text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Reassessment During the visit Alert, oriented, and cooperative Language barrier Slight pain on palpation of the left hemithorax BP 140/85 HR 74r SpO2 98% on room air RF 18 apyretic Pulmonary examination: Bilateral diffuse vesicular murmur, no additional sounds Cardiac examination: valid, rhythmic tones Abdominal examination: distended abdomen, palpable, not tender or painful, Blumberg negative, peristalsis + Lower limbs: no edema, perfused skin, no signs of DVT Neurological examination: GCS 15, isochoric, isocyclic, and normally reactive pupils, Mingazzini I and II normal, no sensory deficit, cranial nerves intact, FNT correctly performed, no rigidity, PERSONS_NAME negative, no lateral drift, ambulation is permitted Left frontoparietal lacerated and contused wound, dressed Dressings for abrasions on the left knee and right medial ankle Upon admission: - Blood tests -> Hb 149 - rest ok - Venous BGA -> normal acid-base balance - lactate 1.46 - rest ok - Antigen test neg - Cervical spine-brain CT scan -> no post-traumatic lesions - X-ray of DLS spine, chest, pelvis, left knee, and right ankle -> no post-traumatic lesions - ECG -> SR HR 58 left axis, 1 PVC Left hemithorax X-ray: no fractures Venous BGA: pH 7.39 pCO2 43 HCO3 25 lat 1.72 - Hb 15.9 (stable) - electrolytes ok - hgt 100 FAST scan: no intra-abdominal effusion - no pericardial effusion - no pleural effusion, bilateral sliding present conferred with the RELATIVE by telephone Recent Medical History confirmed The speed of the patient's bicycle is unclear.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "No other vehicles involved Accident occurred in PLACE PLACE - 12:00 p.m. Report for judicial authorities is compiled Discharged home with instructions", 0.0, 0.5)
